Hey guys, welcome to Themeplate 19. This is the co-creative close. And if you recall back on the coaching the conversion process map, we had a third pulse point where you really check in with your audience and give them a sense of ownership in that conversation. This is the third part where it takes place. So this themeplate leverages a few key principles that really help coach decisiveness. We invite co-creation, for example, which gives our prospect this sense of power and ownership of the outcome instead of dealing like something is being forced upon them, which creates resistance. We also take the spotlight off of them for a moment and frame the offer as their chance to help us fulfill our mission to help them. And it sounds selfish and altruistic all at the same time, but what we're doing is we're just reminding them that their decision extends beyond just themselves, which helps coach decisiveness. But the big pull of this email is in presenting and coaching binary choice. So instead of the prominent question in their mind being, do I want this product or do I not want this product? We create this dynamic where do I want this version of it or do I want that version of it? And what this does is it presupposes that they bought, that they purchased, that they enrolled. So this technique can be done using different payment options, different package options that feel particularly customized and engineered for that prospect's success. So here's how it boils down on the theme plate. We're going to open up with that deadline urgency. Just put it front and center. Quickly mention the full transformation that awaits. Declare your personal want for them to join. This is okay. You're allowed to say why you want them to join. You're allowed to express your own FOMO for them. And then using the moment of highest tension, talk about why this is important to you in an almost selfish way and ask them what they need to make it happen. Option one, which could counter a big objection like time or money and package or version number two, which would counter a second big objection, perhaps their self doubt. And then you could put that, you know, you have the option to add scarcity or a limit on those bonuses depending on what they are. So let's take a look at an example and see how this actually plays out. So we have the subject line, eight hours. What can I do or closing? Which one of these should I hook you up with? So some curiosity drivers there. Hey, Jen, I'm reaching out because I need a little favor here. In a few hours, the End of Yoga hustle masterclass will be shutting down for six months while we support hundreds of new members in their quick ascend from overwhelmed and underpaid yoga teacher to fully fledged yoga crush, earning what they're worth in creating multiple new revenue streams that deepen their impact and support a life of greater flow and abundance. And here's the thing. I really want you in here. So it's an almost selfish call to action. I created this program because it absolutely rips me apart to see good hearted yoga teachers wrestle with burnout before caving into the pressure from friends and family to go back to a normal job. So this is be honest. What breaks your heart? What's your moment of highest tension and how did your moment of highest tension match theirs? The world doesn't need any more overworked yoga teachers stretched more thin than their favorite Lulu's. And if you're at this critical make or break juncture of your career, it would absolutely break my heart to see you miss out on your chance to finally step into your fullest potential and share that abundance and openness as a gift to all those you serve. So yes, this is all about why you do what you do. And now you're going to need their help, which begs the question, what do you need most for me to help make that happen? And here we're inviting that cooperation, that sense of collaboration and them to express their own agency and will. So bonus option one, if the investment is a little scary for you or your time is so stretched in that you'll only realistically be able to invest one or two hours per week and learning and implementing that I'm happy to offer you an extended double your yoga rate guarantee. So we're dying. We're taking these objections, you know, the price objection, we're taking the, I don't know if I have time to implement objections and we're meeting that head on by simply just extending the guarantee. So instead of normal 30 day, you'll get full two months to learn and implement. And from this new place of clarity, power and abundance, you can make a final decision about whether or not this was the best investment you've ever made in your growth as a yoga professional. Awesome. A full 60 days really helps me a ton. That will really allow me the space and time to apply what I'm learning and give it an honest shot. Cool. Option number two for the next 20 enrollment. So we have a little bit of scarcity here, or if you do have the time and are eager to implement right away, but you are still feeling some stinging doubts about whether or not this is right for you. Or if you, yes, you will be capable of implementing and putting them into action that I want to offer you a second option. Only pick one of the two, please. So we're really reinforcing the fact that there's the binary choice and they have to choose only one. Here you'll get two personal one on one coaching sessions. We'll Skype it up for 20 minutes each. The first in week two, another in week four, which are the critical spots for building and maintaining momentum. This will make sure you stay on track at the full benefit of the program and get over any personal hurdles that may be keeping you from unleashing your fullest potential as a yoga professional. As it stands, this is the only way to get personal access to me. And because I need to be very careful about creating boundaries around my own time, you learn about that in module five. I'm capping this at the next 20 enrollment. So there's some very legitimate scarcity there. You know, whenever you're including something that's non leveraged like your time, that is not a false scarcity tactic. Whatever you decide, I just want to ask that you make and fully own your decision. If the time isn't right for you, be cool and at peace with that. But if you know that it's just the fear talking, I invite you to step up and choose the extra bonus that will serve you most in the coming weeks. And then closing with that binary choice again, this time, giving them a chance to co create their package, their offer. It's kind of like the build a bear factory except for online training. So there you go. That really encourages them to make a choice. It feels binary. It takes the decision away from am I in or out and more from am I in inversion A or am I in inversion B and they feel empowered and included in that choice. So that is it. We have actually wrapped up all the theme plates here in module seven. We do have additional ones in the six figure email theme play pack. So if you have access to that, you can dive in and find a few extras there as well. Either way, I do encourage you to put them into action. You know, there's a lot of theme plates here. It's designed to give you a wide variety, some that are going to maybe work better for you and your audience, some that maybe even you feel more personally drawn to than others. But either way, I do want you to get started and start writing a few before you dip into some of the other ones you might find in six figure email. So that is all I have for you here. I'm going to check out right now and I will catch you soon. Take care guys.
